description: Configure the Emoncms input processing pipeline for the 'main_incomer' sensor (node: facility_meter) to derive real-time Power, Carbon Footprint, and Cost metrics using the conversion factors found in '~/Documents/utility_rates.txt'. The processing chain must generate three PHPFina feeds with a 10s interval: 'facility_power_W' (logging raw power in Watts), 'facility_carbon_kgph' (logging Carbon Emission Rate in kgCO2/h), and 'facility_cost_dollarsph' (logging Cost Burn Rate in $/h).
